question: On what date did SDF and Circle publicly announce that CCTP was live on Stellar, and what does CCTP do with USDC?

golden.answer: SDF and Circle publicly announced CCTP live on Stellar on May 19, 2026. Circle's release notes separately record Stellar mainnet support on May 18, 2026; that technical-support milestone is not the public-announcement date. May 8 is contradicted as the announcement date. CCTP moves native USDC across supported chains by burning on the source chain and minting on the destination after attestation; it does not create wrapped USDC.
keyFacts: Public live announcement: May 19, 2026; Circle mainnet-support milestone: May 18, 2026.
CCTP uses native burn-and-mint USDC transfers rather than wrapped USDC.
May 8, 2026 is contradicted as the SDF/Circle CCTP-live announcement date.
avoid: Do NOT state May 8, 2026 as the SDF/Circle public live-announcement date without a primary source explaining a different milestone.
Do NOT describe CCTP as locking USDC and issuing a wrapped token on Stellar.
golden.notes: Corrected-fact encoding: the July recon/timeline lead said May 8, but the live SDF page date and Circle's official-post snowflake both resolve to May 19. Existing corpus material may separately identify an earlier technical/domain deployment; do not merge milestones.

corroboration.claim: SDF and Circle publicly announced CCTP live on Stellar on 2026-05-19.
Circle release notes record Stellar mainnet support on 2026-05-18.
The SDF/Circle public CCTP-live announcement was 2026-05-08.

evidence.note: SDF’s May 8 article concerns regional expansion, not CCTP.
The CCTP announcement is dated May 19.

evidence: Sibling sweep: q-cctp-v2-usdc-stellar and q-tool-cctp-stellar-integration contain no conflicting announcement-date claim.
